Argument Reference

  • compartment_id - (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment to contain the dedicated AI cluster.
  • defined_tags - (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • description - (Updatable) An optional description of the dedicated AI cluster.
  • display_name - (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the dedicated AI cluster.
  • freeform_tags - (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • type - Changing this field forces a new resource.
  • unit_count - (Updatable) The number of dedicated units in this AI cluster.
  • unit_shape - Changing this field forces a new resource.
